metadata.description: A curated catalog of Claude Code plugins from SuperScript. All plugins are external — no plugin code lives in this repository.

plugins.name: plugin-ops
plugins.description: A plugin implementing various plugins operations.

plugins.description: Skills for creating and maintaining FreeBSD ports

plugins.description: POSIX shell programming conventions for sh scripts
